title: Safe Tools
description: Prevents damageable tools and weapons from being used when they have exactly 1 durability left.
body:
# Safe Tools

Safe Tools prevents players from using damageable items when they have exactly **1 durability** left.

## Features

- Blocks using tools and weapons at exactly 1 durability
- Prevents block breaking with nearly-broken tools
- Prevents attacking entities with nearly-broken weapons
- Plays a warning click sound when the action is blocked
- Lightweight and vanilla-friendly
- Supports Fabric from **1.20.1** through **1.21.11**

## Why use it?

This mod helps prevent accidental tool breakage during mining, combat, and general survival gameplay.

## Notes

- Works with damageable items such as pickaxes, axes, shovels, hoes, swords, and similar modded tools
- Creative mode is not restricted
- Designed to be simple, lightweight, and compatible with modpacks
